description: abstract a leaf insight upward to ancestor nodes / root global insights (Backpropagate, upward)
rules: appends the abstracted lesson to the immediate parent's insight by default
TO_ROOT=1 also records it as a global insight on the root (n0)
insight propagation is the component that drives most of HTR's gains — abstract, don't copy verbatim
usage: Set NODE (the leaf the lesson came from) and INSIGHT (the direction-level abstraction); set TO_ROOT=1 to also update root global insights. Output: propagate.txt. If no run exists, a bootstrap run with a root + one child node (n1) is created first.
limitation: Appends the wording you supply — the abstraction quality is the coordinator's judgment, not the script's. NODE must have at least one ancestor (i.e. not be the root).

vars.INSIGHT: Candidate coverage, not verification, limits this direction
